overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character in period attire exploring a riverboat at dusk. The character moves from an outdoor deck with string lights into an elegant interior lounge with ornate decor, then exits to a covered promenade deck. The scene features warm artificial lighting against a moody purple-orange twilight sky with a distant city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining deck of a riverboat with string lights

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wooden deck toward the interior entrance, passing dining tables and a planter

notable_agents.action: group of people socializing near the deck house entrance

entered.detail: warm glowing bulbs strung across the overhead deck structure
white wooden structure with illuminated windows and awnings
white tablecloths on circular tables with chairs arranged around them
white wooden lattice container with pink and white flowers
silhouetted buildings against the purple twilight sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the outdoor deck of a riverboat at dusk, with warm string lights illuminating the wooden deck. The character walks past round dining tables and a lattice planter box with flowers, heading toward a doorway in the deck house while a few NPCs stand socializing in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elegant lounge and bar with ornate ceiling details

events.description: character enters the interior lounge through a wooden door from the outdoor deck
character approaches the bar counter and slows briefly before turning

agents.ego_description: walking through the elegant lounge, passing couples and approaching the bar area before turning toward the exit

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the wooden bar counter
couple in formal attire conversing near the wall

entered.detail: intricate white plasterwork with circular patterns and recessed designs
deep red carpet with decorative patterns running the length of the room
ornate white support columns with decorative capitals
dark wooden bar with brass fixtures and bottles visible behind
elegant hanging light fixtures with multiple bulbs
brass wall-mounted lamps with warm glowing light

segments.scene_description: The character enters an opulent interior lounge featuring an ornate ceiling with intricate plasterwork, white pillars, and a red carpet runner. The warm artificial lighting from chandeliers and wall sconces illuminates several NPCs in period clothing socializing and a bartender behind the bar. The character walks the length of the room, approaches the bar, then turns toward a side exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered promenade deck along the ship's railing

events.description: character exits the lounge onto a covered exterior promenade deck

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow promenade deck next to the ship's railing, with the open water and city skyline visible

entered.detail: white decorative metal railing with geometric patterns along the deck edge
wooden deck chairs with white cushions stacked against the wall
rectangular windows with white frames along the ship's exterior wall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the lounge onto a narrow covered promenade deck, walking alongside a decorative white railing with the dark water and distant city skyline visible beyond. The deck features wooden flooring, wall-mounted lights, and stacked deck chairs, with the ship's exterior wall and portholes on the left. The scene is quiet with no other people present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open-air deck of a riverboat into a lavish interior lounge before emerging onto a quiet, covered promenade. It begins on the outdoor wooden deck at dusk, moving past string lights, dining tables, and socializing guests toward the entrance of the deck house. As the character steps inside, the environment shifts to an opulent lounge defined by an ornate plaster ceiling, white pillars, and a red carpet runner, where the camera follows the character past guests and a bartender toward a side exit. The scene then opens back up to the outdoors as the character exits onto a narrow promenade deck, transitioning from the crowded warmth of the interior to a solitary walk along a white railing. Finally, the camera glides past stacked deck chairs and portholes, revealing the dark water and a distant city skyline under the twilight sky.
